reflection.candidate_lesson: When the 30-indicator consensus shows conv=100% but green_matches=0 and hist_hr is 0%, the signal is structurally unvalidated and must be sized down or vetoed despite the conviction reading.
reflection.mechanism: conv=100% measures live indicator agreement (how many of 30 point the same way right now), but green_matches=0 means no historical analog exists for this exact configuration — and hist_hr=0% confirms the few analogs that did exist lost. High live agreement with zero validated precedent is the signature of a crowded directional read into a catalyst (NFP morning), where institutional flow reverses on the print. EURUSD (conv 100% SHORT, hist_hr 0%) and USDJPY (conv 100% LONG, hist_hr 0%) are exactly this trap; GBPUSD (conv 100%, hist_hr 67%) and AUDUSD (conv 100%, hist_hr 72%) are validated and tradeable.
reflection.testable_rule: if consensus_conviction >= 1.0 and green_matches == 0 and hist_hr < 0.40: size *= 0.0  # veto. elif consensus_conviction >= 1.0 and hist_hr >= 0.60: size *= 1.0  # full

validation.reason: Rule filters only 0 trades — insufficient sample
